title: Heavy Inventory
description: This mod makes managing your inventory even more difficult, as now the more items you have, the slower you will be. However, with the dumbbell you can train, get stronger and carry more items.
body:
![Heavy Inventory opening logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/V7CQgDJq/images/1e8a18a68f557da3a6fa3eddc0b426ccb2b87e78.png)


This mod makes managing your inventory even more difficult, as now the more items you have, the slower you will be. However, with the dumbbell you can train, get stronger and carry more items.

You have a limit of training per day and if you don't train for 2 days you will lose muscle mass. It is also possible to train more in a single day by consuming Whey Protein.

Too much weight will make it difficult to jump, 100% weight will not allow jumping.

 

The weight of the items also counts within the Shulker Box.
 

This Mod has a system to move and hide your HUD if necessary, just look at the key shortcut menu.

 

 

Questions, suggestions and bugs. Please comment.

### **Compatibilities:**
<details>
<summary>Click me!</summary>

Minecraft Forge 1.20.1

            * Travelers Backpack

            * Sophisticated Backpacks

            * Any item that has an inventory and uses Vanilla or Mcreator logic

 
Minecraft Forge 1.19.4

            * Travelers Backpack

            * Sophisticated Backpacks

            * Any item that has an inventory and uses Vanilla or Mcreator logic

 
Minecraft Forge 1.19.2

            * Travelers Backpack

            * Sophisticated Backpacks

            * Any item that has an inventory and uses Vanilla or Mcreator logic

</details>
